caption:
Bio:
A bit of a smooth talker with two prominent arms and a moderately sized core. I tend to be cigar-shaped, edge-on, and sometimes have satellite friends hanging around — zoom in for a better look!
Bio: Got tight, defined spiral arms and a moderate bulge that's perfectly rounded. I'm a little disturbed by stars, but hey, who isn't? 😉
Bio: I'm edge-on and cigar-shaped, so you know I've got a unique perspective. I’m smooth with tightly wound mysteries, and a moderate bulge—wanna explore?
Bio:Got a thing for spirals? I've got arms for days, and a bulge that's just the right size. I'm a little clumpy and sometimes a bit disturbed, but aren't we all? 😉

Bio: I'm a smooth operator with a moderate bulge and a slightly rounded shape - I'm told I'm quite the star! Looking for someone to get lost in the cosmos with; no merging needed, just a minor disturbance to keep things interesting.
Bio: Smooth operator with two tight spiral arms ready to embrace you! My bulge is moderately sized and I'm mostly chill, but I might have a little minor disturbance occasionally. 😉
Bio: I'm the kind of galaxy with a moderate bulge that's half boxy, half not. No spiral arms to tie you down, but watch out—I might be merging soon and I get scattered easily!

Bio: I'm all edge – literally! Love long walks perpendicular to the galactic plane, and chilling without any clumps of drama. Looking for someone to explore the universe with. Slide into my DMs, I promise, my bulge is mostly harmless!
Bio: I'm smooth, a little cigar-shaped, and have a moderate bulge you'll adore. I'm mostly drama-free, but let's just say I've got a *minor disturbance* in my heart for you.
Bio: Curvy, with a dominant bulge and two tight spiral arms ready to embrace. Might be a *little* clumpy at times, but isn't everyone? 😉
Bio: Got some serious spiral arms and a weak bar, but I'm still a supernova in the streets. I'm a bit boxy on the edges, but I promise my bulge is all large and in charge where it counts.
Bio: Mostly smooth with a rounded bulge, though I can be a little cigar-shaped. Got two spiral arms, sometimes tight, sometimes loose, and I'm always ready to wind them around you!

Bio: I'm a well-rounded kinda gal, no arms or bar to hold me back, and no dominant bulge here! I’ve got a few scattered artifacts and minor disturbances in my past, but I’m ready to zoom in on something new.
Bio:I'm a smooth operator with a moderate bulge, definitely not cigar-shaped. A bit clumpy, but I'm working through some merging issues... wanna explore each other's stars?

Bio: I'm a spiral with arms for days, tightly wound and ready for adventure. Some say I'm a bit of a handful but I'm just moderately bulged and mostly harmless, unless you can't handle a little minor disturbance. 😉
Bio: A little shy at first, but I've got a tight spiral you'll want to explore. Definitely zooming in on you – wanna see if we have some cosmic chemistry?
Bio: Mostly smooth, but I've got a dominant bulge you might be interested in... Can't tell you how many arms I'm hiding, but they're medium winding for sure! Ready to zoom into my DMs?

Bio: Not too smooth, but definitely packing some featured curves and a moderate bulge to admire. I've got two spiral arms ready to wrap around you, and a tight winding that'll keep you hooked. Want to see what these clumps are all about? 😉
Bio: I've got smooth features and a moderate bulge, perfectly rounded for your viewing pleasure. My arms are tightly wound and a little disturbed, ready to pull you into my orbit!
Bio: I've got tight arms for days, and a moderate bulge that's sure to keep things interesting. I'm a bit of a mess right now, all zoomed in, but maybe you can help me get it together? 😉
Bio: Got two gorgeous spiral arms ready to embrace you! I can be a bit of a problem, but it's just some stars and artifacts trying to get in my picture. 😉
Bio: I'm a mixed bag – a bit smooth, a bit featured, and always zooming in to get a better view. Got loose spiral arms and a moderate bulge, ready to entangle with the right galaxy. 😉
Bio:I'm mostly smooth around the edges with a moderate central bulge and two tightly wound arms ready to embrace you. A little clumpy and star-struck, but aren't we all? ✨
